headline: Regency Centers Founder Passing Prompts Estate Sales And Valuation Check
summary: Regency Centers co founder Joan Wellhouse Stein Newton has passed away, marking the loss of a key early leader for the company. Following her passing, the Newton family disclosed estate related sales of Regency Centers shares. The company has indicated that these transactions do not change its leadership direction. For investors watching Regency Centers, NasdaqGS:REG, the update comes with the stock recently closing at $76.58 and showing a 12.7% return year to date and a 12.2% return over...
